BOOK NOW

Pet Orthotics & Prosthetics

Custom-fabricated orthotic braces and prosthetic devices designed to support injured limbs, restore function, and improve mobility for pets with special needs.

BOOK NOW

Beyond wheelchairs, Healing Paws Center offers custom veterinary orthotics and prosthetics to address a wide range of limb conditions.

Orthotic braces support limbs affected by trauma, neurological disease, or age-related degeneration.

Prosthetics replace missing or amputated limbs, restoring weight-bearing function and confidence.

Common Orthotic Cases We Treat

CCL tears

Carpal hyperextension (wrist collapse)

Achilles tendon rupture

And more

Each device is custom-fabricated to your pet's unique anatomy
